direct_message_delete.title: Delete conversation
direct_message_delete.prompt: Delete the conversation with {room}? Its history will be removed from your account. The other participant will keep their copy.
direct_message_delete.local_cleanup_failed: The conversation was deleted, but this device could not remove all cached data.
direct_message_delete.history_body: Messages, threads, files, and cached drafts from this conversation will no longer be available to you.
direct_message_delete.peer_title: The other participant keeps their copy
direct_message_delete.peer_body: Nothing is deleted from their account, and they are not notified about this action.
direct_message_delete.reopen_title: Future messages can reopen the conversation
direct_message_delete.reopen_body: Only messages sent after deletion will appear. The previous history will stay hidden.
